content:
## cheapest place to buy a house
cheapest place to buy a house
letting people know where the cheapest place to buy a house is

### Response from Department of Conservation
Status Different agency responsible
Comments Kia ora,
 
Thank you for your enquiry.
 
The Department of Conservation does not hold the data you’re seeking. As housing is not a core function of DOC, we are unable to provide information on this matter.
 
You may wish to contact an agency whose functions are more closely aligned with your request. The Ministry of Housing and Urban Development or Quotable Value Limited (QV) may hold property-related data or analytics that could assist. The following links could also be of assistance:

- https://www.hud.govt.nz/stats-and-insights/local-housing-statistics/key-data
- https://www.qv.co.nz/price-index/

#### Likely Source Agency
Department of Conservation
1
								
									Subscriber
